records.ety: [L. elapsus, p. p. of elabi to glide away; e out + labi to fall, slide. See Lapse.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Elapsed (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Elapsing.]

defs: To slip or glide away; to pass away silently, as time; -- used chiefly in reference to time.
quotes: Eight days elapsed; at length a pilgrim came.
